summary: The cargo test suite completed successfully with 824 passed tests and 0 failures, but the CI job encountered a QuickInstall download failure (HTTP 402 Payment Required) and a missing Rust/cargo toolchain cache, forcing fallback to a third-party source.
root_cause: QuickInstall download failed with HTTP 402 (Payment Required) when fetching pre-compiled cargo-cache binary for aarch64-unknown-linux-musl from warehouse-clerk-tmp.vercel.app. The Rust/cargo toolchain cache was missing, requiring fallback to a third-party source.

evidence.quote: WARN Failed to send quickinstall report for package cargo-cache-0.8.3-aarch64-unknown-linux-musl: Failed to download from remote: could not HEAD https://warehouse-clerk-tmp.vercel.app/api/crate/cargo-cache-0.8.3-aarch64-unknown-linux-musl.tar.gz: HTTP status client error (402 Payment Required)
evidence.reason: Explicit HTTP 402 error from external QuickInstall service indicates payment/access gating or service unavailability blocking binary download

evidence.quote: Cache does not exist using key setup-rustcargo-v1-linux-7c530854792d94f7b695674397a2fbe2abc9b540
evidence.reason: Missing Rust/cargo toolchain cache forced the system to rely on external downloads, leaving it vulnerable to QuickInstall service failures

evidence.quote: The package cargo-cache v0.8.3 (aarch64-unknown-linux-musl) has been downloaded from third-party source QuickInstall
evidence.reason: Confirms fallback to third-party source after QuickInstall failure

evidence.quote: test result: ok. 824 passed; 0 failed; 3 ignored; 0 measured; 0 filtered out
evidence.reason: Cargo test suite itself completed successfully, so the job failure is not due to test failures but to environmental/setup issues

suggested_fix: Verify the external QuickInstall service at warehouse-clerk-tmp.vercel.app is accessible, not rate-limiting, and check if the CI runner has proper network access and authentication for downloading pre-compiled ARM binaries. Consider pre-warming the Rust/cargo toolchain cache in the CI environment.
